text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday. I got you those nail wraps you
said you wanted.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, I've been dying to try these! Literally
gagged! Anything City picks out is sure to be
straight up gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I picked out some designs I think you'd
like. Also, is it just me, or have nail wraps really
stepped up their game lately?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Totally! They're like, so easy to apply! And you
can layer 'em, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, not having to scrape them off like gel
nails is a lifesaver! My nails are thanking me for
real.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Right, they're a breeze to get off. Gel nails are
such a pain when you have a photoshoot...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, right. Didn't you say before that you don't
really do your nails outside of work?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I know, let's try on some of those wraps you just
gave me! Here, I'll help you put 'em on!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Um, sure, I guess... These were supposed to be for
you, though...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Well they're mine now, no? So like, I can use them
how I want, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha... You win, girl. Go ahead.
